notes: Renames Pathmark Online Home to Dashboard and reframes it around stability, progress, and resources.
Adds a weekly at-a-glance view for calendar time, tasklist rows, Google Tasks checklist items, safe weekly spend, and unallocated cash flow.
Adds a Needs attention section that surfaces gaps in routines, projects, calendar time, income, irregular costs, and shortfalls.
Updates the public release hub wording to reflect the broader wellbeing, progress, and financial-management scope.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release_notes: Reframes the Pathmark Online home as a life dashboard that integrates wellbeing routines, progress projects, and spending plan signals.
